name: Rogan Josh
recipeIngredient: 1½ pounds lamb or beef stew meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend ginger, garlic, and 4 tablespoons water in a blender until smooth paste.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Brown meat cubes in several batches; set aside.
3. Add cardamom, bay leaves, cloves, peppercorns, and cinnamon to hot oil; stir once and let simmer until cloves puff and bay leaves change color (about 1 minute).
4. Add onions; fry until medium brown, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in ginger-garlic paste for 30 seconds, then add meat cubes and juices; cook another 30 seconds.
6. Add 1/6 of yogurt; stir until blended, about 30 seconds.
7. Gradually add remaining yogurt, a tablespoon at a time, stirring until well combined (3-4 minutes).
8. Stir in the rest of the broth (more for beef than lamb); bring to boil, scraping browned spices from pot sides and bottom.
9. Cover; reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour with lamb or 2 hours with beef, stirring every 10 minutes.
10. Remove lid; turn heat to medium and boil off excess liquid until meat is tender and sauce thickens.
11. Sprinkle garam masala and black pepper over the dish before serving.
